user.title: Sensor Sentinel
user.description: Set up the performance-safe unavailable-entity watchdog. You can tune exclusion rules afterwards from the Configure button.

abort.already_configured: Sensor Sentinel is already set up.

init.title: Exclusion rules & tuning
init.description: Rules over lists. Anything matched here is never reported as down.

data.grace_period: Grace window (seconds a flap is ignored)
data.integration_threshold: Roll up as one incident at N entities per integration

data_description.bad_states: Which entity states count as "down". An entity in one of these states — past the grace window and not excluded — becomes a reported incident. Default: unavailable + unknown.
data_description.excluded_domains: Whole domains to never report (e.g. button, scene). Pick from the domains present in your system, or type one.
data_description.excluded_integrations: Whole integrations to never report. Every entity from a selected integration is fully excluded. The list is the integrations currently in your system; you can also type one that isn't loaded yet.
data_description.excluded_patterns: Glob patterns matched against entity_id, e.g. *_firmware or roborock_*.
data_description.grace_period: How long an entity must stay bad before it's reported, so brief flaps don't page you.
data_description.startup_grace: At startup, hold entities that are already bad for this long before counting them, so transient boot-time unknowns (MQTT, Z-Wave interview) don't spike the count. Anything that recovers inside the window is never counted.
data_description.integration_threshold: When at least this many entities from one integration are down at once, report them as a single rolled-up incident. 0 disables the roll-up.
data_description.realert_hours: Send a reminder notification when an entity is still down after this many hours. 0 disables re-alerts.
data_description.stale_days: Incidents down longer than this are treated as retired devices: dropped from the count and notifications, but still shown (flagged) in the card. 0 disables.
data_description.auto_recovery: When on, try to heal an entity that stays down: ping Z-Wave nodes, or reload the owning integration — with attempt caps and cooldowns. Off by default.
data_description.recovery_delay: How long an entity must be down before the first recovery attempt (only used when automatic recovery is on).
data_description.notify_targets: notify.* service names without the notify. prefix, e.g. mobile_app_your_phone.

preview.title: Dry-run preview
